accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurately describe the War Powers context and sponsors.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details trace to the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution's purpose to remove US forces from unauthorized hostilities against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly references the War Powers Resolution and the statutory expedited-procedure provisions invoked.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately captures the rule of construction carve-outs and the declaration-of-war/AUMF exception.

effective_dates.why: Notes introduction and calendar dates and correctly states no further effective date is specified.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers findings, operative removal directive, expedited procedures, and rule of construction.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive throughout with no editorializing.

concise.why: Detailed but free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names Senator Kaine, the Committee on Foreign Relations, and the cited statutes.

correct_figures.why: Dates February 28, 2026, April 27, 2026, and May 19, 2026 all match the bill text.
